visual_description: A group of people stands at the far end of a long, dark, wooden corridor. The camera is positioned low to the ground, looking up the length of the corridor towards them. The scene is dimly lit, with the figures appearing as silhouettes against the faint light at the end.
audio_description: A low, ominous rumbling sound begins and grows louder, creating a sense of suspense and impending danger.
